rule.description: Group of Windows rules for the Security channel
Group of Windows rules for the System channel
Group of Windows rules for the Application channel
Group of Windows rules for the Sysmon channel
Group of Windows rules for the System channel
Group of Microsoft Windows Firewall With Advanced Security rules
Group of Windows rules for the McAfee channel
Group of rules for Windows Eventlog from Security channel
Group of rules for Windows Eventlog from System channel
Group of Microsoft Security Essentials rules
Failed attempt to perform a privileged operation
User account locked out (multiple login errors)
First time this user logged in this system
Logon Failure - Unknown user or bad password
Logon Failure - Account logon time restriction violation
Logon Failure - User not allowed to login at this computer
Logon Failure - User not granted logon type
Security Enabled Global Group Member Added $(PlayTechSecurityEvents.MemberSid)
Security Enabled Global Group Member Removed $(PlayTechSecurityEvents.MemberSid)
Security Enabled Local Group Member Added $(PlayTechSecurityEvents.MemberSid)
Security Enabled Local Group Member Removed $(PlayTechSecurityEvents.MemberSid)
Security Enabled Universal Group Member Added
Security Enabled Universal Group Member Removed

rule.info: Bogus group user added to upon creation

rule.description: Group Policy Creator Owners Group Changed
RAS and IAS Servers Group Changed
Incoming Forest Trust Builders Group Changed
Terminal Server License Servers Group Changed
Enterprise Read-only Domain Controllers Group Changed
Allowed RODC Password Replication Group Changed
Denied RODC Password Replication Group Changed
Certificate Service DCOM Access Group Changed
Windows DC integrity check on decrypted
Windows DC - Clock skew too great
Multiple failed attempts to perform a privileged operation by the same user
An IPsec Main Mode negotiation failed
An IPsec Quick Mode negotiation failed
An IPsec Extended Mode negotiation failed
IPsec dropped an inbound packet that failed an integrity check
IPsec dropped an inbound packet that failed a replay check
IPsec dropped an inbound clear text packet that should have been secured
IPsec received a packet from a remote computer with an incorrect Security Parameter Index (SPI)
During Main Mode negotiation, IPsec received an invalid negotiation packet
During Quick Mode negotiation, IPsec received an invalid negotiation packet
During Extended Mode negotiation, IPsec received an invalid negotiation packet
An IPsec negotiation with a remote computer failed because the IKE and AuthIP IPsec Keying Modules (IKEEXT) service is not started
IPsec Services failed to get the complete list of network interfaces on the computer
IPsec Services failed to initialize RPC server. IPsec Services could not be started
IPsec Services has experienced a critical failure and has been shut down
IPsec Services failed to process some IPsec filters on a plug-and-play event for network interfaces
IPsec Services encountered a potentially serious failure

group:
sysmon_event_10 lsass.exe ^0x1010$|^0x1410$|^0x143A$ Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process attack_stage_Credential_Access,attack_category_Credentials_Dumping, pci_dss_10.6.1,pci_dss_11.4,gdpr_IV_35.7.d,hipaa_164.312.b,nist_800_53_AU.6,nist_800_53_SI.4,
268301 C:\\Windows\\System32\\svchost.exe|C:\\Windows\\System32\\taskmgr.exe|C:\\Windows\\System32\\perfmon.exe|C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\MsMpEng.exe|C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\.+MsMpEng.exe|C:\\Windows\\System32\\wbem\\wmiprvse.exe C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\program files\\windows defender\\mprtp.dll\p\.+|C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\taskmgr.exe\p\.+|C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\System32\\wdc.dll\p\.+|C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Definition Updates\\{\w+}\\mpengine.dll\p\.+|C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\cimwin32.dll\p\.+ Legitmate lsass Process - Built-in Windows Processes

268301 C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Symantec\\Symantec Endpoint Protection\.+Bin\\ccSvcHst.exe C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\wow64cpu.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\wow64.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Symantec\\Symantec Endpoint Protection\.+bin\\ccLib.dll\p\.+\|\.* Legitmate lsass Process - Symantec Endpoint Protection

sysmon_event_10 lsass.exe ^0x1010$|^0x1410$|^0x143A$|^0x1400$|^0x147a$|^0x143a$ \\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE.dll\p\.+\|UNKNOWN Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process from Unknown Call Trace attack_stage_Credential_Access,attack_category_Credentials_Dumping, pci_dss_10.6.1,pci_dss_11.4,gdpr_IV_35.7.d,hipaa_164.312.b,nist_800_53_AU.6,nist_800_53_SI.4,

268328 WinCollect.exe [Windows] Legitmate Process Logon no_log

sysmon_event1 ^addinprocess\W|^addinprocess32\W|^addinutil\W|^bash\W|^bginfo\W|^cdb\W|^csi\W|^dbghost\W|^dbgsvc\W|^dnx\W|^fsi\W|^fsiAnyCpu\W|^kd\W|^ntkd\W|^lxssmanager.dll\W|^msbuild\W|^mshta\W|^ntsd\W|^rcsi\W|^system.management.automation.dll\W|^windbg\W|^wmic\W|^certutil\W|^hh\W|^addinprocess$|^addinprocess32$|^addinutil$|^bash$|^bginfo$|^cdb$|^csi$|^dbghost$|^dbgsvc$|^dnx$|^fsi$|^fsiAnyCpu$|^kd$|^ntkd$|^lxssmanager.dll$|^msbuild$|^mshta$|^ntsd$|^rcsi$|^system.management.automation.dll$|^windbg$|^wmic$|^certutil$|^hh$|\Waddinprocess\W|\Waddinprocess32\W|\Waddinutil\W|\Wbash\W|\Wbginfo\W|\Wcdb\W|\Wcsi\W|\Wdbghost\W|\Wdbgsvc\W|\Wdnx\W|\Wfsi\W|\WfsiAnyCpu\W|\Wkd\W|\Wntkd\W|\Wlxssmanager.dll\W|\Wmsbuild\W|\Wmshta\W|\Wntsd\W|\Wrcsi\W|\Wsystem.management.automation.dll\W|\Wwindbg\W|\Wwmic\W|\Wcertutil\W|\Whh\W|\Waddinprocess$|\Waddinprocess32$|\Waddinutil$|\Wbash$|\Wbginfo$|\Wcdb$|\Wcsi$|\Wdbghost$|\Wdbgsvc$|\Wdnx$|\Wfsi$|\WfsiAnyCpu$|\Wkd$|\Wntkd$|\Wlxssmanager.dll$|\Wmsbuild$|\Wmshta$|\Wntsd$|\Wrcsi$|\Wsystem.management.automation.dll$|\Wwindbg$|\Wwmic$|\Wcertutil$|\Whh$ Detect suspicious Windows commands attack_stage_Execution,attack_category_Suspicious_Command_Execution,
^4688$ ^addinprocess\W|^addinprocess32\W|^addinutil\W|^bash\W|^bginfo\W|^cdb\W|^csi\W|^dbghost\W|^dbgsvc\W|^dnx\W|^fsi\W|^fsiAnyCpu\W|^kd\W|^ntkd\W|^lxssmanager.dll\W|^msbuild\W|^mshta\W|^ntsd\W|^rcsi\W|^system.management.automation.dll\W|^windbg\W|^wmic\W|^certutil\W|^hh\W|^addinprocess$|^addinprocess32$|^addinutil$|^bash$|^bginfo$|^cdb$|^csi$|^dbghost$|^dbgsvc$|^dnx$|^fsi$|^fsiAnyCpu$|^kd$|^ntkd$|^lxssmanager.dll$|^msbuild$|^mshta$|^ntsd$|^rcsi$|^system.management.automation.dll$|^windbg$|^wmic$|^certutil$|^hh$|\Waddinprocess\W|\Waddinprocess32\W|\Waddinutil\W|\Wbash\W|\Wbginfo\W|\Wcdb\W|\Wcsi\W|\Wdbghost\W|\Wdbgsvc\W|\Wdnx\W|\Wfsi\W|\WfsiAnyCpu\W|\Wkd\W|\Wntkd\W|\Wlxssmanager.dll\W|\Wmsbuild\W|\Wmshta\W|\Wntsd\W|\Wrcsi\W|\Wsystem.management.automation.dll\W|\Wwindbg\W|\Wwmic\W|\Wcertutil\W|\Whh\W|\Waddinprocess$|\Waddinprocess32$|\Waddinutil$|\Wbash$|\Wbginfo$|\Wcdb$|\Wcsi$|\Wdbghost$|\Wdbgsvc$|\Wdnx$|\Wfsi$|\WfsiAnyCpu$|\Wkd$|\Wntkd$|\Wlxssmanager.dll$|\Wmsbuild$|\Wmshta$|\Wntsd$|\Wrcsi$|\Wsystem.management.automation.dll$|\Wwindbg$|\Wwmic$|\Wcertutil$|\Whh$ Detect suspicious Windows commands attack_stage_Execution,attack_category_Suspicious_Command_Execution,
-->

sysmon_event1 whoami|hostname|reg.exe\.+add|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat|net.exe\.+start|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|net.exe\.+user|nmap|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|net start|netstat -ano|route print|arp -a|sc config|netsh advfirewall|netsh wlan|netsh interface ip|tftp|cmd /c powershell.exe|findstr|req query Detect suspicious Windows commands - Set 2 attack_stage_Execution,attack_category_Suspicious_Command_Execution,
^4688$ whoami|hostname|reg.exe\.+add|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat|net.exe\.+start|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|net.exe\.+user|nmap|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|net start|netstat -ano|route print|arp -a|sc config|netsh advfirewall|netsh wlan|netsh interface ip|tftp|cmd /c powershell.exe|findstr|req query Detect suspicious Windows commands - Set 2 attack_stage_Execution,attack_category_Suspicious_Command_Execution,

rule.description: Whitelist Whatsapp app for wmic command

rule.field: whoami|hostname|reg.exe\.+add|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat|net.exe\.+start|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|net.exe\.+user|nmap|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|net start|netstat -ano|route print|arp -a|sc config|netsh advfirewall|netsh wlan|netsh interface ip|tftp|cmd /c powershell.exe|findstr|req query

whoami|hostname|reg.exe\.+add|systeminfo|tasklist|netstat|net.exe\.+start|net.exe\.+time|qprocess|net.exe\.+user|nmap|whoami.exe /all|whoami.exe /priv|net group "Domain Admins" /do|net group "Enterprise Admins" /do|net start|netstat -ano|route print|arp -a|sc config|netsh advfirewall|netsh wlan|netsh interface ip|tftp|cmd /c powershell.exe|findstr|req query

rule.description: Whitelist Lenovo Scheduled Update Suspicious Command
Legitmate HPSupportSolutionsFrameworkService - Detect malicious Windows command execution
Legitmate HPSupportSolutionsFrameworkService - Detect malicious Windows command execution
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate using ADFSDump/ADFSpoof
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate - Certifcate exported
Solarigate Technique: Malicious ADFS Trust Modification
Solarigate Technique: Dumping of ADFS Certificate - Name pipe suspicious access
Leguitimate Teams Driver - Detect dll run by regsvr32
Member Added to a Privileged Group
local computer to local administrators group
Legitmate Chrome Update - External Access by BITS
Detected Potential CVE-2020-1472 Netlogon Denied Connection
Detected Potential CVE-2020-1472 Netlogon Denied Connection
Detected CVE 2021-1675 Windows Print Spooler RCE Vulnerability
Legitimate Windows Update - Windows Audit Policy changed.
AD FS 1102 event - Not real log cleared
MSSQL Alert: Logon failure to PlayTech MSSQL server multiple times in a short period of time. Client IP: $(srcip)
